hero.title: Everything we have made public.
hero.dek: Books, podcast conversations, working guilds, and Garden guides from across the Greenpill network.
hero.body: Use the Library as the public knowledge commons. Keep private Drive docs as research references until they have a public mirror or steward approval.

sections.title: The foundation shelf.
sections.dek: Greenpilled, Impact DAOs, Onchain Impact Networks, Pathways to Regeneration, Grassroots Economics, Ethereum Localism, and adjacent Greenpill books remain core public material.
sections.body: Book counts should be derived from the content collection, not hardcoded from the HiFi constants.

sections.title: A long-running public conversation.
sections.dek: The podcast archive has 296 public episodes in the current Libsyn RSS snapshot.
sections.body: Render recent episodes from the build-time RSS snapshot and keep archive links clearly external.

sections.title: Working circles and living guides.
sections.dek: Guild cards should show public working circles, while Knowledge Garden cards stay focused on onboarding, stewardship, and living guides.
sections.body: Use source-backed guide cards for the Garden and keep generic project docs out of that section.

gardenCard.title: Enter the Garden
gardenCard.summary: A public onboarding ramp from a light newsletter subscription to a high-intent steward call.
gardenCard.imageAlt: Garden texture from the high-fidelity design package

seo.title: Library · Greenpill Network
seo.description: Browse Greenpill books, recent podcast episodes, public guilds, and Garden onboarding material.
